title: PULSE
lyrics: 🎵 🎵 Your... 🎵 🎵 Your thunder... 🎵 🎵 Your weakness... 🎵 🎵 Finally find you here... 🎵 🎵 I'll spell away... 🎵 🎵 At least your mind is awake... 🎵 🎵 I can still feel you... 🎵 🎵 I can still hear you... 🎵 🎵 Hovering... 🎵 🎵 Through the deep dark I roam... 🎵 🎵 Through the night I... 🎵 🎵 I go... 🎵 🎵 Conquering the fools... 🎵 🎵 A range of rules... 🎵 🎵 I got four paws motherfucker high as the... 🎵 🎵 Moon... 🎵 🎵 Yeah... 🎵 🎵 Writing all the words in my mind... 🎵 🎵 Bringing all the words in my mind... 🎵 🎵 Telling you lies... 🎵 🎵 Cause I'm feeling fine... 🎵 🎵 Who gets to curate this? 🎵 🎵 Who gets to curate this? 🎵 🎵 Are we just curate this time? 🎵 🎵 Can we feel the monkey men go down? 🎵 🎵 In ecstasies of a lie all their hate... 🎵 🎵 And death it despises... 🎵 🎵 And you... 🎵 🎵 And it all... 🎵 🎵 I see... 🎵 🎵 Is misery... 🎵 🎵 Yeah, misery flying inside it all... 🎵 🎵 Misery coming to take us all... 🎵 🎵 Take it all... 🎵 🎵 From me before I love it too much... 🎵 🎵 Yeah... 🎵 🎵 Take it all from me before I love it too much... 🎵 🎵 Cause I'll take it all... 🎵 🎵 Take it all... 🎵 🎵 I'll take your soul... 🎵 🎵 If you let me love you just like rock and roll... 🎵 🎵 Please don't be the one to deny... 🎵 🎵 All my love, the pulse it's inside... 🎵 🎵 Goes deeper... 🎵 🎵 Still feeling you far away... 🎵 🎵 It goes deeper... 🎵 🎵 Still healing me far away... 🎵 🎵 Beyond the times... 🎵 🎵 We've locked away... 🎵 🎵 Holiday... 🎵 🎵 Beyond your mind... 🎵 🎵 They still find a way to eat me away... 🎵 🎵 Because hope cries when the devil broke... 🎵 🎵 And I can't feel the high... 🎵 Thanks for watching! Don't forget to subscribe! Thanks for watching! Thanks for watching!
